calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Tuesday, August 25, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Wednesday, June 9, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves from Apr 6–10 (2025–2026) to Mar 29–Apr 2, pulling the break about one week earlier.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday (Mar 26) is observed as a school holiday the Friday before Spring Break begins (Mar 29), creating a 6-day break window.

calendarNotes: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 25, 2026 — the latest start among North Carolina's large districts. Good Friday (March 26) is observed as a school holiday the Friday before Spring Break begins (March 29–April 2). The school year ends June 9, 2027.
